title: Administrative Arrangement: the loan of the Bayeux Tapestry and the Sutton Hoo Treasure and other masterpieces
body: "This document details the administrative agreement for the loan of the Bayeux Tapestry to the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the loan of the Sutton Hoo Treasure and other masterpieces to the French Republic.  The Bayeux Tapestry will go on display at the British Museum in 2026. "
